fontSize 1100
labelFontSize 200
fillColor FFFFFF
drawBackground
fillColor 000000

# ==== Box: U+046C
strokeWidth 20
strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 196 0 /uni046C
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+046C"
move 1400
